mapper.select:
SELECT a.auction_idx, a.auction_title, a.auction_target_price, a.auction_end_at, ic.item_category_name, i.item_thumbnail_img,
COUNT(b.bid_idx) AS b_count, IFNULL(MIN(b.bid_price), 0) AS min_price FROM auction a
LEFT JOIN item_category ic ON a.item_category_idx = ic.item_category_idx
LEFT JOIN bid b ON a.auction_idx = b.auction_idx
LEFT JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx WHERE a.auction_status_idx = 1 GROUP BY a.auction_idx, a.auction_title, a.auction_target_price, a.auction_end_at, ic.item_category_name, i.item_thumbnail_img ORDER BY a.auction_regdate DESC

SELECT a.auction_idx, a.auction_title, a.auction_desc, a.auction_target_price, a.auction_end_at, a.auction_decision_deadline, ic.item_category_name, i.item_thumbnail_img, COUNT(b.bid_idx) AS b_count, IFNULL(MIN(b.bid_price), 0) AS min_price FROM auction a LEFT JOIN item_category ic ON a.item_category_idx = ic.item_category_idx LEFT JOIN bid b ON a.auction_idx = b.auction_idx LEFT JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx WHERE a.auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} GROUP BY a.auction_idx, a.auction_title, a.auction_desc, a.auction_target_price, a.auction_end_at, ic.item_category_name, i.item_thumbnail_img
